offers.title: Unite Special Edition
offers.description: Special Edition of RPG MAKER UNITE and 5 pieces of material Add-Ons

offers.title: Far Cry New Dawn Ultimate
offers.description: It's time to defend Hope County with this bundle featuring both Far Cry® 5 Gold Edition and Far Cry® New Dawn Deluxe Edition!

offers.title: Assassin's Creed® Valhalla Complete Edition
offers.description:
Includes the game, all expansions, and more! 

Wars will rage. Kingdoms will fall. This is the age of the Vikings.

offers.title: Ghost Recon Breakpoint Ultimate Edition
offers.description: Become a Ghost, fighting against a rogue spec ops faction called the Wolves, in the latest Tom Clancy's Ghost Recon®!

offers.title: Assassins Creed Odyssey Ultimate Edition
offers.description: Enhance your Assassin's Creed® Odyssey experience with the ULTIMATE EDITION, including the game, the DELUXE PACK and the SEASON PASS.

offers.title: Far Cry® 6 Game of the Year Edition
offers.description:
The Game of the Year Edition Includes:
-Far Cry® 6 game
-New Expansion, Lost Between Worlds
-Season Pass
-Ultimate Pack

offers.title: Secret Doctrine
offers.description:
Welcome to the science-fiction world! 
Do we always know for sure where a subway car is taking us to? A routine trip back home turns into a course of unusual adventures for the hero of the story.

offers.title: Back 4 Blood: Ultimate Edition
offers.description: Back 4 Blood: Ultimate Edition includes the base game, 4 character Battle Hardened Skin Pack, additional digital in-game items, and annual pass with three upcoming downloadable content drops and more.
